tasks.title: Inventory Pathwell source notes
acceptance_criteria: Summarize what each source file is authoritative for
Flag duplicated, stale, or conflicting notes without resolving them silently
Identify which files are required context for story-logic work

tasks.title: Stress test therefore/but chain
acceptance_criteria: Trace the story chain using therefore/but logic
Separate broken links from weak-but-usable links
Produce actionable findings rather than vague impressions

tasks.title: Draft revision options for highest-priority chain gaps
acceptance_criteria: Address the highest-priority broken or weak chain links from TASK-002
Give at least two concrete revision options for each selected gap
Explain tradeoffs for Elizabeth's agency, Pathwell's motive, Shade's motive, and escalation
Do not overwrite canon; mark proposals as proposals
